title: Completion Source
description: Disambiguator for `completion_rate` metrics, which are dual-natured: the seller witnesses completion via player events (the seller's player fired the completion beacon), and third-party measurement vendors can also independently attest to completion via SDK callbacks, panel methodology, or server-side beacon validation. The two paths can yield materially different rates — particularly in SSAI environments where the player's view of completion may differ from a vendor's. Used as a `qualifier.completion_source` key on `committed_metrics`, `missing_metrics`, and `metric_aggregates` to disambiguate which path the row represents.

enumDescriptions.seller_attested: The seller witnessed and counted the completion event (typically via the ad server or player firing the completion beacon). Source of truth is the seller's delivery infrastructure.
enumDescriptions.vendor_attested: An independent third-party measurement vendor attested to the completion (typically via SDK callbacks, panel methodology, or beacon validation). Source of truth is the vendor; the vendor identity is anchored on the matching `performance_standard.vendor` BrandRef in the buy contract.
